$comment: Single source of truth for the builtin local-LLM models. Imported by the main process (localLLM/modelDownloader) and re-exported for the renderer via src/shared/types.ts. exactSizeBytes/sha256 pin the download for integrity verification when set (fill from `curl -s 'https://huggingface.co/api/models/<repo>?blobs=true'` -> siblings[].size / siblings[].lfs.oid, and pin downloadUrl to the revision commit from the same response's `sha` field); when null, the downloader falls back to verifying against the server-reported Content-Length.

models.label: Qwen2.5-0.5B
models.description: Small, fast model that runs on any hardware. Good for quick feedback loops.

models.label: Phi-3-mini-128k
models.description: Larger, higher-quality model with real long-context support. ~2.4GB download; needs noticeably more RAM and CPU/GPU than Qwen.
